app.title: Playable Instrument
app.subtitle: Take a photo. Play it instantly.

home.title: Playable Instrument
home.description: Photograph any instrument — real or painted. AI identifies it, you play it instantly.

capture.title: Photograph an Instrument
capture.subtitle: Point your camera at any instrument — real or painted. AI identifies it, you play it instantly.
capture.instruction: Take a photo or upload an image

play.title: Play
play.subtitle: Type a vibe. Hit a pad. That's it.

sitar.name: Sitar
sitar.description: Indian stringed instrument with sympathetic strings and a resonant sound

tabla.name: Tabla
tabla.description: Indian drums played with hands, typically in pairs

guitar.name: Guitar
guitar.description: Six-stringed instrument played with fingers or pick

flute.name: Flute
flute.description: Woodwind instrument that produces sound through air flow

piano.name: Piano
piano.description: Keyboard instrument with 88 keys and strings struck by hammers

violin.name: Violin
violin.description: Stringed instrument played with a bow

djembe.name: Djembe
djembe.description: West African drum played with hands

koto.name: Koto
koto.description: Japanese stringed instrument with 13 silk strings

harp.name: Harp
harp.description: Stringed instrument with many strings played by plucking

bansuri.name: Bansuri
bansuri.description: Indian bamboo flute traditionally played in pairs

erhu.name: Erhu
erhu.description: Chinese two-stringed fiddle played upright with a bow

mbira.name: Mbira
mbira.description: African percussion instrument with metal or wood tines

balalaika.name: Balalaika
balalaika.description: Russian stringed instrument with triangular body

oud.name: Oud
oud.description: Arabic fretless stringed instrument with pear-shaped body

taiko.name: Taiko
taiko.description: Large Japanese drum played with wooden sticks

shamisen.name: Shamisen
shamisen.description: Japanese three-stringed lute with long neck

marimba.name: Marimba
marimba.description: Wooden bar percussion instrument from Africa

bouzouki.name: Bouzouki
bouzouki.description: Greek stringed instrument with paired strings

sarangi.name: Sarangi
sarangi.description: Indian bowed stringed instrument with resonant sound

pipa.name: Pipa
pipa.description: Chinese pear-shaped lute with four strings

hurdyGurdy.name: Hurdy-Gurdy
hurdyGurdy.description: European string instrument played with a hand-crank

saxophone.name: Saxophone
saxophone.description: Brass woodwind instrument with single reed

errors.cameraNotFound: Camera not found. Please check permissions.
errors.identificationFailed: Could not identify the instrument. Please try another photo.
errors.invalidImage: Invalid image format. Please use JPG or PNG.
errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
errors.midiNotSupported: MIDI not supported in this browser. Try Chrome/Edge/Safari.

help.uploadTip: Works best with clear photos of the instrument
help.micTip: Point camera at the instrument from the front
help.playTip: Click pads to play. Drag to adjust volume.
help.exportTip: Export your recording as WAV or MIDI
